descriptor: Knowledge base with store shipping and refund policies, stream setup notes, weekly schedules, membership perks, giveaway rules, and digital support policies.

documents.title: Store Shipping Policy
documents.content:
# Shipping Policy
Orders to Canada usually arrive in 5-7 business days.
Orders to the United States usually arrive in 3-5 business days.

# Returns Policy
Returns are accepted within 30 days for unopened items.

analysis.match: Orders to Canada usually arrive in 5-7 business days.
analysis.summary: Shipping timelines cover Canada, the United States, and a 30-day unopened-item return window.
analysis.overallSummary: Store order policies covering delivery timelines and return rules.

documents.title: Stream Setup Notes
documents.content:
# Camera Setup
Use Camera 2 for face cam during solo streams.

# Audio Setup
Set OBS audio monitoring to Monitor and Output when routing alerts.

# Knowledge Base
RAG search answers from the custom knowledge base before the bot replies.

analysis.match: Use Camera 2 for face cam during solo streams.
analysis.summary: Setup notes cover Camera 2, OBS audio monitoring, and how the bot uses the custom knowledge base.
analysis.overallSummary: Stream setup notes covering camera, audio, and knowledge-base bot behavior.

documents.title: Weekly Stream Schedule
documents.content: Tuesday is retro night. Friday is community games night. Saturday starts at 7 PM Eastern.

documents.title: Premium Membership Perks
documents.content: Premium members get access to the Saturday aftershow and the Discord lounge.

documents.title: Giveaway Rules
documents.content:
# Giveaway Rules
Monthly giveaway winners are announced on the first Tuesday of each month.
Entrants must be at least 18 years old.

analysis.match: Monthly giveaway winners are announced on the first Tuesday of each month.
analysis.summary: Giveaway rules cover winner timing and an 18 plus age requirement.
analysis.overallSummary: Giveaway rules with announcement timing and age eligibility.

documents.title: Digital Support Policy
documents.content: Digital download refunds are unavailable after the file has been downloaded.
